hook.name: Flaunch POSM v4 (Base)
hook.description: Flaunch's PositionManager is a Uniswap v4 hook that manages the full lifecycle of memecoin launches, from token creation and fair-launch phase to ongoing swaps. It incorporates an InternalSwapPool for protocol fee accumulation, a BidWall for native-token liquidity support, and a FeeDistributor that routes swap fees to creators and optional referrers encoded in hookData.
